about
work
play

robot painting

2025

Installation for the world's first AI art museum: Dataland, by Refik Anadol Studio.

manifold

2025

The first mobile robot at the Exploratorium, learning to endear itself to visitors.

handle with care

2025

An interactive poem imbuing language with physical fragility.

multi-robot flocking

2024

An installation of flocking robots which respond to human movement.

weather whimsy

2024

An exploration of hand gestures for digital manipulation.

magic camera

2024

An experiment in creating an augmented photographic experience.
